nuggets.text: Elai.io's features page positions the product around creating AI videos with customizable digital presenters from text, with 80 plus avatars, 75 plus languages, and 450 plus voices.
Elai's API materials describe text-to-video generation with digital presenters and multilingual output in more than 75 languages.
Elai's enterprise pages list text-to-video, PPTX-to-video, auto translation, screen recording, voice cloning, and realtime AI chat in the core workflow stack.
Elai's enterprise offering lists SSO, team collaboration, brand kit support, custom integrations, screen recording, and custom avatar plus voice cloning features.
Elai's security policy says uploaded scripts, texts, photos, videos, and music are covered as protected data categories.
Elai's current terms say paid service fees, including renewal fees, are non-refundable.
The same features page highlights prompt-based generation, AI script crafting, video generation from URLs, presentation-to-video conversion, voice cloning, and four types of custom avatars.
Elai's current terms say users may terminate paid service access at any time by contacting Elai Support.
Elai's API onboarding uses a personal API token and points users to dedicated API documentation for implementation details.
Local Elai.io plan data models a Free tier with 1 user, 1 minute, 80 plus avatars, 75 plus languages, and Full HD 1080p access as a testing entry point.
Creator is modeled at $29 monthly or $23 monthly billed yearly for 1 user, up to 15 minutes per month, 1080p Full HD, and full avatar, voice, and language library access.
Team is modeled at $125 monthly or $100 monthly billed yearly and adds 3 editors plus 3 guests, custom images and fonts, premium voices, and Ultra 4K HD video.
The local Team plan data also defines multiple monthly-minute bands at 50, 100, and 150 minutes, indicating Elai's team usage scales by seat and usage bundle rather than simple unlimited access.
Enterprise is modeled with unlimited users, 3 voice clones, 3 selfie avatars, premium avatars, brand kit, workspaces, SSO, and premium support.
Elai's feature set repeatedly emphasizes localization and content transformation workflows, including presentation-to-video, URL-to-video, and multilingual narrator output.
The feature page says Elai supports four custom avatar modes: Selfie, Studio, Photo, and Animated mascot.

Local plan data and feature positioning together suggest Elai is strongest for text-first presenter videos with localization and brand controls, rather than for deep timeline editing or open-ended generative filmmaking.

topUpClaims.note: Official help says the Free plan adds a watermark, while the Creator plan removes watermarks on videos.
Official help says subscriptions can be canceled any time from the account settings. Current workspace guidance also says deleting a workspace does not trigger refunds for leftover credits.
Official help says Creator includes 15 video minutes per month, monthly minutes do not roll over, and annual subscriptions provide the full year's minutes upfront.
Official help says Creator renders at 1080p Full HD and Team renders at Ultra 4K HD, with Team also including all Creator features.
Official workspace docs describe admin, user, editor, reviewer, and locked roles, with role-based access to rendering, billing, API keys, and workspace content.

topUpFlags.note: Current public pricing and help pages document plan gating, collaboration, and cancellation, but they do not cleanly resolve a broad ownership or commercial-rights conclusion for all generated outputs.
